After watching too many YouTube videos I finally did my first Ultra marathon.  100km from Putney to Henley in a bit over 12 hours.  Tough but super enjoyable. Despite being unable to walk already looking up next race to do ð¤¦

Only made possible with help from my crew @hadleyabby (after doing a brilliant 50k earlier in the day) and my pacers @chrisspurr @curtiselectrical
